basic_details.job_title: IIM Raipur Junior Accounts Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Raipur (IIM Raipur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Raipur has released the official Junior Accounts Executive Notification 2026 on 27 April 2026 at the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIM Raipur Junior Accounts Executive Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 35 years with a qualification of B.Com (minimum 60%) and M.Com (minimum 60%) with 5 years of relevant experience in finance & accounts can apply online from 27 April 2026 to 17 May 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation applicable as per Government of India rules (SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Ex-Servicemen/EWS).

qualification.details: B.Com with minimum 60% marks or equivalent grade and M.Com with minimum 60% marks or equivalent grade (both from a recognized University/Institute). Minimum 5 years of post-qualification relevant experience in finance & accounts from reputed educational institutions such as IIMs, IITs, IIITs, NITs, IISc, AIIMS or comparable national institutions.

salary_details.details: Consolidated emoluments equivalent to minimum of Pay Level 6 (7th CPC) Basic Pay: ₹35,400/- per month + allowances.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on eligibility & experience Personal interview / written test / skill test
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Raipur Junior Accounts Executive Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Raipur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Accounts Executive post at IIM Raipur?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Junior Accounts Executive position at IIM Raipur is 17-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Accounts Executive role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Com with a minimum of 60% marks and an M.Com with a minimum of 60% marks from a recognized university or institute.

faq.question: Q3. How many years of experience are needed for this position?
faq.answer: A minimum of 5 years of post-qualification relevant experience in finance and accounts is required from reputed educational institutions.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Accounts Executive post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Accounts Executive position?
faq.answer: The consolidated emoluments are equivalent to the minimum of Pay Level 6 (7th CPC) Basic Pay, which is ₹35,400/- per month, plus allowances.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the IIM Raipur Junior Accounts Executive recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for General/OBC and SC/ST categories in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Accounts Executive recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their eligibility and experience, followed by a personal interview, written test, or skill test.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Junior Accounts Executive post at IIM Raipur is strictly online.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Junior Accounts Executive position at IIM Raipur is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the apply online link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
